description:
The 'library-system' project has a poor structure: all classes are dumped into a single package 'com.library.app'. Refactor the project into a proper layered architecture by redistributing the classes into the following package structure:
- com.library.model: Book, Member, Loan
- com.library.service: LibraryService, SearchService
- com.library.util: DateUtils, ValidationUtils
- com.library.app: LibraryApp
Ensure the project compiles and builds successfully using Maven.
